---
title: "Ensemble learning"
subtitle: "Bagging, random forests, boosting"
date: "Nov 6, 2026"
date-format: long
---

Why averaging helps; bagging and the bootstrap; random forests and feature subsampling; boosting (AdaBoost, gradient boosting) as a different ensemble philosophy.

**Assigned reading:** ISLR §8.2

---

## Materials

**Slides:** [Slides](class11_clean.pdf) | [Annotated slides](class11_annotated.pdf)

**Code:** [class11_lab1.Rmd](code/class11_lab1.Rmd)

**Supplementary readings:** [Phillips et al. (2023)](readings/Phillips et al. (2023).pdf)
